_template: Operator fills <FILL: …> after rotating SOLANA_RPC_URL to a Worker-egress-permitting provider and running scripts/p3a-rpc-readonly-smoke.sh. Copy to reports/ahin-p3a-rpc-provider-migration.json before editing. Dangerous flags MUST remain false; if any would be true, the readonly boundary was breached and the change must be rolled back.
phase: Phase P3A RPC Provider Migration (403 recovery)
rpcProvider: <FILL: helius | triton | quicknode | other (name only, never the URL/key)>
diagnosticsFixDeployed: <FILL: true|false — whether commit 7cebf9e (off-curve read + sanitized diagnostics) is live on the worker>
rollbackInstructions: Non-destructive. Revert: npx wrangler secret put SOLANA_RPC_URL --config wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc. Remove: npx wrangler secret delete SOLANA_RPC_URL --config wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc (route then fails soft rpc_not_configured, readonly). Transfer/burn/signing/canary stay false; mint+treasury constants immutable; root ahin.io untouched.
boundaries: Readonly migration only. No deploy/secret-set/workflow performed by the agent; mint (7Ydwp…pump) + treasury (5Cohfz…CzRo) immutable; no env override; P3B blocked.
